title: Malik's School Garden Seasons
synopsis: Follow Malik as he discovers how his school garden changes through all four seasons, learning about nature's beautiful cycle of growth, color, and renewal.

chapters.title: Spring and Summer in the Garden

pages.text: Malik loves his school garden! In spring, tiny green shoots peek up from the brown dirt. The air feels warm and fresh.

illustration.description: A young boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes kneels beside a school garden bed with small green sprouts emerging from soil, rendered in soft spring pastels of pale green, light yellow, and gentle pink
illustration.alt: Malik kneeling by spring garden sprouts

pages.text: Malik waters the little plants every day. Soon, bright flowers bloom everywhere! Red tomatoes grow big and round. Yellow sunflowers reach up tall.

illustration.description: The same school garden scene now shows a boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes watering vibrant blooming plants with a small watering can, the garden full of bright summer colors - vivid reds, sunny yellows, and lush greens
illustration.alt: Malik watering the blooming summer garden

pages.text: Summer is the best time! Malik picks juicy strawberries and crunchy carrots. The garden smells so good. Bees buzz around the colorful flowers.

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds a basket of fresh vegetables and strawberries in the same garden location, now at peak summer bloom with brilliant bright colors, buzzing bees, and abundant produce
illustration.alt: Malik harvesting vegetables from the summer garden

pages.text: When autumn comes, the garden changes again. The leaves turn orange, red, and yellow. Malik rakes the fallen leaves into big piles.

illustration.description: The same garden scene in autumn warmth shows a boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes raking colorful fallen leaves, with the garden rendered in rich autumn colors of burnt orange, deep red, and golden yellow
illustration.alt: Malik raking autumn leaves in the garden

pages.text: Winter brings snow to the garden. Everything looks quiet and peaceful. The plants sleep under their white blanket. Malik knows they will grow again.

illustration.description: The same garden location in winter, covered in snow with a boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes looking peacefully at the dormant garden beds, rendered in cool winter tones of soft blues, whites, and pale grays
illustration.alt: Malik observing the snow-covered winter garden

pages.text: Soon spring will come back! New plants will grow. Malik can't wait to plant seeds and watch his garden come alive again. Nature always comes back!

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds seed packets while standing in the same garden scene transitioning from winter to early spring, with subtle spring pastels beginning to emerge through the remaining snow
illustration.alt: Malik with seeds as winter turns to spring in the garden

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Malik do to help his plants grow in spring?
questions.explanation: Malik waters the little plants every day to help them grow big and strong!

questions.question: What colors do the leaves turn in autumn?
questions.explanation: In autumn, the leaves change to beautiful warm colors like orange, red, and yellow!

questions.question: What covers the garden in winter?
questions.explanation: Snow covers the garden in winter like a white blanket while the plants sleep!

questions.question: What does Malik pick from the summer garden?
questions.explanation: In summer, Malik picks yummy strawberries and crunchy carrots that grew in his garden!
